Description: Unique identifier for the employee account
Mobile number used as the login username
Bcrypt hash of the employee's password
Role of the user: ""ADMIN"" or ""TECHNICIAN""
Full name of the employee
Contact telephone number of the employee
Unique identifier/code assigned to the employee
Email ID of the employee
Whether the account is active and can log in
Timestamp when the employee account was created
Timestamp when the account was last modified
Soft-delete timestamp. If set the account is inactive.
Unique identifier for the customer
Name of the customer's company or business
Primary contact person's full name
Primary phone number of the contact person
Secondary / alternate contact number
Email address of the customer
Physical / site address of the customer
Timestamp when the customer record was created
Timestamp when the record was last modified
Soft-delete timestamp. If set the record is inactive.
Unique identifier for the ticket
Auto-generated alphanumeric tracking code
ID of the associated customer
Lifecycle stage: ""ENQUIRY"" | ""REFILLING"" | ""SERVICES"" | ""COMPLETED""
Status within the stage (e.g. "Order Confirmed", "Refilling Order Received")
Description of the fire extinguisher or equipment
Unique cylinder serial / tag number
Cylinder gas capacity (e.g. "2 Kg", "9 Kg")
Type of extinguisher ("CO2" | "DCP" | "Water" | "Foam")
Category of work (e.g. "CCTV", "New Fire Extinguisher", "Refilling")
Enquiry origin ("Existing Customers" | "Social Media" | "Walk-in" etc.)
Detailed notes on what the customer requested
Delivery date requested by the customer
Next scheduled date for a follow-up call / meeting
Summary notes from the most recent follow-up
Actual date the equipment was delivered to the customer
AMC coverage years (1 to 10)
Calculated AMC renewal date (deliveredDate + amcYears)
Date scheduled for the technician site visit
Admin instructions for the task / technician
Technician field notes from the visit
Map URL or coordinates for the customer site
Assignment type: "DELIVERY" | "REFILLING" | "SERVICE"
Serialized JSON for dynamic stage-specific fields
Timestamp when the ticket was created
Timestamp when the ticket was last modified
Soft-delete timestamp. If set the ticket is archived.
Unique identifier for the follow-up entry
Associated ticket ID
Notes from the follow-up conversation
Example Data: Called client, they asked to call back tomorrow

Description: Timestamp when the follow-up record was created
Soft-delete timestamp.
Unique identifier for the assignment record
Associated ticket ID
Assigned technician's employee ID
Timestamp when the technician was assigned
Timestamp when the technician marked the task complete
Technician's task status: "Pending" | "Assign For Service" | "Completed" (REFILLING only gets "Assign For Service")
Post-visit notes logged by the technician
Example Data: No one was at home, returned.

Description: Soft-delete timestamp. If set the assignment is hidden.
Unique identifier for the audit log entry
Associated ticket ID

Ticket stage before the change
Ticket stage after the change
Ticket status before the change
Ticket status after the change
Notes explaining what changed and why

Description: Timestamp when the history entry was recorded
